exam_name: Principles and Practice of Engineering (PE) – Electrical and Computer: Computer Engineering
exam_code: PE Electrical and Computer: Computer Engineering

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Pearson VUE test centers. FE and PE exams taken year-round.

id_requirements: One valid, unexpired government-issued photo ID. Name must match NCEES MyNCEES account exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. NCEES provides an electronic reference handbook (FE Reference Handbook or PE Reference Handbook) on-screen during the exam — no personal reference materials allowed. On-screen calculator provided. Personal calculators NOT allowed. No notes or personal items in exam room.
renewal_options: PE and SE licenses must be renewed per state board requirements. Typically every 2 years with Continuing Professional Competency (CPC) requirements. Requirements vary by state.

prerequisites.description: Must have passed FE exam and hold EIT/EI certification

retake_policy.notes: FE exams: can register immediately after receiving score report. PE exams: most states allow unlimited attempts; check your state board. Full exam fee required for each retake.

official_study_resources.title: FE Reference Handbook
official_study_resources.notes: Free downloadable reference handbook — same version used in the exam

official_study_resources.title: NCEES Practice Exams
official_study_resources.notes: Official practice exams available for FE and PE disciplines

aliases: pe electrical and computer computer engineering
principles and practice of engineering pe electrical and computer computer engineering
